subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer of the divine desert, that which thou hast written hath been heard, and all that thou hast intended hath been observed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته صحرای الهی آنچه مرقوم نمودی مسموع گردید و هر چه منظور نمودی ملحوظ
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast, @scarcity of receptive souls
